misc: Has been working on his mental game a lot
biography: Eero, the pride of Vuosaari Golf Helsinki and younger sibling of the esteemed Pasi, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée. Known for his calm demeanor on the course, Eero has been diligently working on strengthening his mental fortitude, a pursuit that promises to make him an even more formidable competitor.

With eight past appearances, Eero is set to make his ninth showing at the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. While the coveted Hector Trophée has eluded him thus far, his past victory in the Victor Trophy stands as a testament to his individual skill and determination. Supporters are eager to see if this is the year Eero's dedication pays off with a pair victory.
